The '''''Freebooter''-class transport''' was a military [[Transport/Legends|transport]] used by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
It was manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] and was awkward-looking when not in space. 200 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, it looked like a crescent moon bisected by a knife blade, orientated in the direction of the crescent tips, and it had a wide curved stern. [[Beetle Nebula (transport)|''Beetle Nebula'']] was one.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
